description: Unspecified vulnerability in the Oracle Demantra Demand Management component in Oracle Supply Chain Products Suite 7.2.0.3 SQL-Server, 7.3.0.x, 7.3.1.x, 12.2.0, 12.2.1, and 12.2.2 allows remote attackers to affect integrity via unknown vectors related to DM Others.
